languages.text: "Стоит уничтожить заставу меровцев, чтобы лишить Себериана преимущества".
"It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."
languages.original_text: "Стоит уничтожить заставу меровцев, чтобы лишить Себериана преимущества".

traits.locale_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."
"It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."
"It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

languages.text: «Merece la pena destruir el puesto meroviano para negarle la ventaja a Seberian».
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: «Merece la pena destruir el puesto meroviano para negarle la ventaja a Seberian».

languages.text: “为了不让塞贝里安占到优势，摧毁梅罗夫哨站也值了。”
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: “为了不让塞贝里安占到优势，摧毁梅罗夫哨站也值了。”

languages.text: « La destruction du poste merovien aura le mérite de priver Seberian de cet avantage. »
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: « La destruction du poste merovien aura le mérite de priver Seberian de cet avantage. »

languages.text: "Seberian'ı avantajsız bırakmak için Merovluların karakolunu yok etmeye değer."
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ı avantajsız bırakmak için Merovluların karakolunu yok etmeye değer."

languages.text: "Es lohnt sich, den Außenposten der Merovianer zu zerstören, um Seberian den Vorteil zu verwehren."
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: "Es lohnt sich, den Außenposten der Merovianer zu zerstören, um Seberian den Vorteil zu verwehren."

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンの拠点を破壊して、シベリアに有利な状況を与えない価値がある」
languages.original_text: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィアンの拠点を破壊して、シベリアに有利な状況を与えない価値がある」
